name: Snap-on Incorporated
description: Snap-on Incorporated is a leading global innovator, manufacturer, and marketer of tools, equipment, diagnostics, repair information, and systems solutions for professional users performing critical tasks. Founded in 1920 and headquartered in Kenosha, Wisconsin, the company serves a wide range of industries, including automotive, aerospace, agriculture, and construction. Snap-on is renowned for its high-quality hand and power tools, tool storage, diagnostic software, and shop equipment. Through its direct-to-professional sales and distribution network, the company provides productivity solutions that help technicians and professionals work more efficiently and effectively in demanding environments worldwide.
